login.title: Login
login.description: Use your username or email to get a token.

profile.title: Profile
profile.notAuthenticated: You are not signed in. Please use the login page.
profile.tokenHint: The session token is automatically sent in the Authorization: Bearer ... header when calling the profile API.

auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

profile.noToken: No active token found. Please sign in.
profile.loadFailed: Unable to load profile. Please try again.
